title: Start with the basics
descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Plans and scheduling for expanding the office
toolsSubtitle: You can always change tools later.
inviteSubtitle: This project is invite-only. Only people who are explicitly invited can see this project (change)
footerNote: What happens next? We'll drop you right on your project so you can get started. Anyone invited will be notified so they can join in.

tools.label: Message Board
tools.description: Post announcements, pitch ideas, progress updates, etc. and keep feedback on-topic.

tools.label: To-dos
tools.description: Make lists of work that needs to get done, assign items, set due dates, and discuss.

tools.label: Docs & Files
tools.description: Share docs, files, images, and spreadsheets. Organize in folders so they're easy to find.

tools.label: Chat
tools.description: Chat casually with the group, ask random questions, and share stuff without ceremony.

tools.label: Schedule
tools.description: Set important dates on a shared schedule. Subscribe to events in Google Cal, iCal, or Outlook.

tools.label: Card Table
tools.description: A visual, kanban-like tool for process-oriented work. Establish a workflow and move cards across columns.
